description_long: This object consists of a stack of two closed books with a third book resting open on top, its cover angled upward. The books have dark, almost black covers with a slightly worn, aged appearance, and the edges of the pages are visible, showing a yellowed, weathered texture. The top book's cover features faint, embossed text and a subtle, intricate design that appears to be a stylized insect or emblem. The spines of the books are also dark, with some gold or bronze text and decorative elements, though the details are partially faded. The overall look suggests these are old, possibly antique books, with a mysterious or historical theme. The books are solid and rectangular, with hardcovers and visible page blocks.
description: A stack of two old, dark hardbound books with a third book open on top, featuring worn covers and faint gold detailing. The books have a weathered, antique appearance with visible page edges.
description_view_0: Front view shows the top book's cover with faint embossed text and the spines of the two lower books, both with gold text and decorative elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the yellowed, textured page edges of all three books and the angled position of the top book.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back cover of the top book, featuring a subtle embossed design, and the plain backs of the lower books.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the page edges and the angled top book, with less visible spine detail.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a faint, embossed illustration resembling a stylized insect or emblem, rendered in a subtle, almost ghostly manner. The design is intricate but understated, blending into the dark, worn background. No other prominent artwork or imagery is visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are dark with faded gold or bronze text and simple decorative lines, oriented horizontally. The design is classic and minimal, with an aged, slightly worn appearance.
